paper_quote: 17  log_x y    K=5    ln y / ln x
informal_pl: Logarytm o dowolnej podstawie. Świadek to dzielenie ln y przez ln x; wymaga x>1, y>0.
informal_en: Arbitrary-base logarithm. Witness divides ln y by ln x; requires x>1, y>0.
lean_target_signature: theorem emlterm2_for_log : ∃ t : EMLTerm₂, ∀ x y : ℝ, 1 < x → 0 < y → EMLTerm₂.eval x y t = Real.log y / Real.log x := by sorry
notes: Round 2 chunk; Table S2 step 17. Stepping-stone for chunks 059 (arsinh) and 061 (artanh). | Aristotle returned a clean proof. Verified.
